label: 第261話
source_locator: 単行本29巻 目次 p.131
summary_short: 虎杖と東堂が宿儺を追い詰める中、宿儺の前に五条の姿が現れる。乙骨が羂索の術式を模倣し、五条の肉体へ移って戦場に戻っていた。
summary_full: 虎杖と東堂が宿儺を追い詰める中、宿儺の前に五条の姿が現れる。乙骨が羂索の術式を模倣し、五条の肉体へ移って戦場に戻っていた。乙骨は羂索の肉体移動術式を模倣し、死亡した五条の肉体へ自分の脳を移していた。五分経過後の帰結が不明なまま、無量空処で宿儺の領域へ対抗する。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: With 東堂 by his side, 悠仁 forces 宿儺's back against the wall, and yet... can it be?! 宿儺 locks eyes with the ghost of the strongest man he slayed with his own hands. In the absence of 五条悟 , someone else had to step up and become the monster.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 憂太 rejoins the fight in 五条's body. Remembering 脹相 , a furious 悠仁 roars as he drives his hand into 宿儺’s chest, attempting to crush his heart. In response, the King of Curses begins to activate his 領域展開 , but abruptly halts as he senses a presence emerging from the smoke. 宿儺 is momentarily stunned when 五条悟 appears before him, but upon noticing the stitches across his forehead, he immediately understands the truth. Knocking 悠仁 aside, 宿儺 praises 乙骨憂太 for resorting to an unthinkable measure in order to defeat him. When 憂太 first proposed transplanting his brain into 五条’s body after his defeat using 羂索 ’s technique, the plan was unanimously rejected. 禪院真希 raised concerns about the consequences of 里香 ’s full manifestation reaching its time limit while 憂太’s brain was transplanted. 冥冥 outlined three possible outcomes, all of which would result in 憂太’s death or him being permanently trapped within 五条’s body. 憂太 ultimately agreed with 秤金次 that the plan would serve only as a last resort, as he intended to challenge 宿儺 within his domain first and claim 五条’s body only if he failed. "If no one else has the guts to do it... then I'll be the monster!! " Despite this, the remaining sorcerers continued to oppose the plan. 日下部篤也 denounced it as unethical, prompting 憂太 to angrily argue that unethical methods were unavoidable when facing 宿儺. He accused the others of hypocrisy for accepting 五条 as a “monster” while rejecting the same role for him. 憂太 then declared that he would inherit his teacher’s legacy and become that “monster” himself if no one else was willing. Sometime later, 憂太 disclosed the plan directly to 五条 while walking through the halls of the 東京 呪術高専 with the other second-year students. 五条 agreed, though he expressed mild irritation that 家入硝子 had accepted the plan without hesitation. 憂太 brought up 烏鷺亨子 ’s remark that he was descended from the Fujiwara Clan , questioning whether it might be true given that 五条 himself was descended from the Sugawara Clan . 五条 dismissed the idea but speculated that 烏鷺 could be correct if 憂太 originated from a higher lineage. He then lectured 憂太 on 呪力 control before dismissing the students upon reaching a room, stating that he intended to kill the higher-ups inside. The three students refused to leave, unwilling to let their teacher shoulder the burden of becoming a monster alone. As 五条 entered the room alone, he lamented the fact that he was left behind by 傑 and has to catch up. The gong sounds on the revenge match! At another point in time, 凛 甘井 demonstrated his innate technique, which allowrf him to externally manifest the sugar within his body as pudding. Observing this, 硝子 recruited him to assist the medical team alongside herself and 新田新 , believing his technique could help supply someone’s brain with sugar when activating cursed techniques. After 憂太 was fatally wounded by 宿儺 and transported to the medical ward, 硝子 sutured 五条’s body while 新 used his 術式 to stabilize 憂太. Sustained by 里香 but nearing his limit, 憂太 requested that 硝子 proceed with the brain transplant. After completing the sutures, 硝子 instructed 憂太 to activate 反転術式 at maximum output following the transfer to complete his treatment. 憂太 then apologized to 里香 for wearing his ring on his right hand. In the present, 憂太 and 宿儺 simultaneously activate their domain expansions. Armed with the solution to 宿儺’s open-barrier domain left behind by his teacher, 憂太 unleashes 無量空処 and clashes it against 伏魔御廚子 , marking the beginning of their revenge match.

candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: Cursed 術式 新田新's 名称不明の生得術式 術式 凛 甘井's 名称不明の生得術式 術式 宿儺の術式 領域展開：伏魔御廚子 乙骨憂太の術式 模倣 Brain Transplant* 領域展開：無量空処 無下限呪術 Brain Transplant*

verification_notes_phase11: 集英社公式24～30巻目次・巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別資料、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した最終区間。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
